creator: gaod@hychen.org
text:
Hi Stephon,

Did you upgrade ATS from 3.0?

If so, please stop ATS, run 'traffic_server -Cclear' then start ATS again.

2012/12/24 Stephon Chen <stephon@gmail.com>:
> Hello All
> Sorry for my fault, it's the mistake of diff file not fully patched.
> But the functionality is not workable, shows that
>
> [Dec 24 15:52:47.588] Server {0x10024041c0} WARNING: Access logging to lo=
cal
> log directory suspended - configured space allocation exhausted.
> [Dec 24 15:52:47.602] Server {0x10024041c0} NOTE: traffic server running
> [Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:
> [LocalManager::pollMgmtProcessServer] Server Process terminated due to Si=
g
> 9: Killed: 9
> [Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:  (last system error 0=
:
> No error: 0)
> [Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR: [Alarms::signalAlarm]
> Server Process was reset
> [Dec 24 15:53:05.601] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:  (last system error 0=
:
> No error: 0)
> [Dec 24 15:53:06.618] Manager {0x10022041c0} NOTE:
> [LocalManager::startProxy] Launching ts process
> [TrafficServer] using root directory '/usr/local'
>
> Will lookup further to check out what the problem is.
>
> --
> Stephon, Bo-Chong Chen
> System Engineer
> PIXNET Digital Media Corp.
> email: stephon@gmail.com
